wrapper_fields.course: medicine, pediatrics, surgery, obstetrics, microbiology, or community
wrapper_fields.topic: System/chapter such as Cardio, Respiratory, Bleeding, Trauma
wrapper_fields.lecture: Lecture/topic file title such as Arrhythmia

question_fields.id: Recommended stable unique ID, e.g. med-cardio-arrhythmia-001
question_fields.correct: Zero-based correct index: A=0, B=1, C=2, D=3, E=4, F=5. Letters A-F are also accepted.
question_fields.wrong: Array of wrong-option explanations, or a single string separated by |
question_fields.mode: Optional. detailed is used automatically if omitted.
